title: Reign of Nether Addons
description: It makes play with Reign of nether mod more interesting
body:
# 🌋 Reign of Nether Additions

**Reign of Nether Additions** is a curated expansion pack designed to enhance and deepen the gameplay of the original *Reign of Nether* experience. This add-on focuses on atmospheric immersion, challenging progression, and rewarding exploration.

---

## 🚀 Features

### ⚔️ Combat & Equipment
* **New Weapon Tiers:** Discover unique materials to craft gear capable of withstanding the toughest bosses.
* **Custom Artifacts:** Find rare items hidden in the deepest corners of the world that grant permanent buffs.

### 🗺️ World Exploration
* **New Structures:** Explore ruined citadels and forgotten outposts scattered across the dimensions.
* **Mob Variants:** Encounter more dangerous versions of vanilla and modded creatures with unique abilities.
* **Enhanced Biomes:** Subtle tweaks to terrain generation for more breathtaking landscapes.

### 🛠️ Mechanics & QoL
* **Resource Packs:** A lot of resourcepacks to make your game more satisfying.
* **Shader Packs:** A shaderpack to add light,shades and make your game beautiful.

---

## 📜 Credits & Links

* **Original Mod:** [https://modrinth.com/mod/reign-of-nether-rts]
* **Support mod author:** [https://buymeacoffee.com/solegendary]

> **Disclaimer:** This is an unofficial expansion. Always backup your world before installing new updates.
